title: girardinia diversifolia subsp. ciliata
intro: Girardinia diversifolia subsp. ciliata, also known as the "Chinese Thistle Spinach" or "Yin-Chen", is a medicinal plant that belongs to the Urticaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Girardinia diversifolia subsp. ciliata include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and treating digestive issues such as diarrhea and constipation. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or dried extract, and is also used in herbal preparations like tinctures and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
